title: Complete v4 home_map — 17 live WAI-Spoke categories unmapped (no-orphan gate findings)
situation: The migration-engine dry-run on live WAI-Spoke/ (impl-v4-migration-engine-v1) surfaced 17 categories present on disk but unclaimed by spec-v4-migration-home-map-v1.home_map. The no-orphan invariant is a HARD gate — a real upgrade --execute will refuse to run until these have homes. Some are new v4 infra (managed/ = harness.db, added S45); others are root files (taste.spoke.yaml, dev-config.json, spoke-profile.json, WAI-State-extended.json, etc.). Bucket classification needs the Historian survey (stale vs active), per the spec's lay-of-the-land precondition.
decision_rationale: Surfaced rather than silently passed (semantic-verification discipline). The engine is correct; the MAP is incomplete. Each orphan needs a home_map row {category, home, layer, bucket} informed by the survey — not a guessed classification baked in here.
perceive: Run the Historian lay-of-the-land survey on WAI-Spoke/ to classify each orphan active vs stale.
Read spec-v4-migration-home-map-v1.four_bucket_rules + existing home_map rows for the right layer/bucket conventions.
execute: For each of the 17 categories, add a home_map row with category, home (spoke/{layer}/...), layer, bucket (survey-informed), note.
managed/ -> likely spoke/local/db/ or its own managed-runtime home (it holds harness.db, the storage layer).
tastegraph*.json + taste.spoke.yaml -> spoke/local/graphs/ (TasteGraph) per existing convention.
WAI-*.jsonl indexes not matching the WAI-*Index glob (WAI-Challenges/Changelog) -> spoke/managed/indexes/.
Re-run the engine dry-run on WAI-Spoke/ -> assert zero orphans (gate passes).
verify: v4_migrate dry-run on live WAI-Spoke/ returns ok=True, orphans=[] after the map update.
Each of the 17 has exactly one home_map row; bucket is survey-justified, not guessed.
acceptance_criteria: All 17 unmapped categories claimed by exactly one home_map row
Bucket classification informed by a Historian survey (not guessed)
Engine dry-run on live WAI-Spoke/ passes the no-orphan gate (zero orphans)
gt_convoy_hint: FRAMEWORK — map completion; survey-informed; unblocks a real upgrade --execute
outcome: Closed via historian_core survey (100% coverage). Added 10 home_map rows to spec-v4-migration-home-map-v1 covering all 17 orphans (survey-informed buckets: Transform indexes/db, Preserve docs/config/graphs/ozi, Flag templates/audit/ledger). v4_migrate dry-run on live WAI-Spoke now returns ZERO orphans — no-orphan gate passes.
context_snapshot: Harness-v4 build object (epic-harness-v4-self-certifying-v1), authored in session-20260609-0031. Closed via survey-informed home_map completion; v4_migrate dry-run zero-orphan (S45). Migrated to schema_version=4 + rev=1 in S46 reconcile.
alternatives_considered: Guess the 17 buckets — rejected: classification must be survey-informed (semantic-verification discipline); ran historian_core first
Add to flag_candidates only — rejected: explicit home_map rows are the spec's preferred no-orphan mechanism
